damage_description: Gas pipelines between Russia and Germany blown up
notes: Excluded from Leiden dataset due to potential Ukrainian involvement. Major sabotage event.

damage_description: Balticconnector gas pipeline ruptured between Finland and Estonia
BCS East-West Interlink data cable severed between Sweden and Lithuania
notes: Chinese bulk carrier. Same vessel responsible for two cables.

damage_description: C-Lion1 data cable severed between Finland and Germany
notes: Same incident as BCS East-West. Ship detained by Danish navy.

damage_description: Estlink 2 power cable severed between Finland and Estonia, reducing power transfer capacity by ~70%
notes: Russian shadow fleet tanker. Finnish authorities seized vessel.

damage_description: TV and fiberoptic cable severed between Sweden and Latvia
notes: Also Norwegian-flagged Silver Dania nearby. Sabotage charges later dropped.

damage_description: C-Lion1 cable disturbance detected, cable repaired
notes: Second incident on same cable. Detected in February 2025.
